summary: Manager Portal testing complete - All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). All 5 Manager Portal pages verified working: Dashboard, Lead Pipeline, My Team, Commissions, Reports. Manager login correctly redirects to /portal/crm and renders ManagerPortal with dark sidebar.
passed_tests: Manager login (manager@plan4growth.uk) returns role=manager and redirects to /portal/crm
Rep login (rep@plan4growth.uk) correctly denied access to /api/manager/* endpoints (403)
GET /api/manager/stats - Returns 4 stat card values: totalTeamLeads, enrolledThisMonth, myCommissionEarned, activeRepsCount
GET /api/manager/top-reps - Returns top reps with name, enrollments, commissionEarned
GET /api/manager/commission-summary - Returns pendingValidation, pendingApproval, approved, payable, paid
GET /api/manager/team-performance - Returns reps with leads, enrolled, conversionRate, commissionEarned, trend
GET /api/manager/reps - Returns reps for dropdown selection
GET /api/manager/pipeline - Returns team leads for Kanban board
GET /api/manager/pipeline?repId={id} - Filter by rep works
GET /api/manager/pipeline?search={term} - Search filter works
GET /api/manager/commissions - Returns manager's own commissions
GET /api/manager/commissions with status filters - All status filters work
GET /api/manager/payable-commissions - Returns payable commission IDs for payout
GET /api/manager/reports/lead-funnel - Returns summary, chartData, tableData
GET /api/manager/reports/enrollments - Returns summary, chartData, tableData
GET /api/manager/reports/enrollments?groupBy=week|month - Both groupings work
GET /api/manager/reports/commissions - Returns summary, chartData, tableData
All reports support date range filters (from/to)
UI: Dashboard shows 4 stat cards correctly
UI: Dashboard shows Top Reps table with rep data
UI: Dashboard shows My Commission Summary
UI: Lead Pipeline shows Kanban board with 6 stages
UI: Lead Pipeline shows rep filter dropdown and search
UI: Lead Pipeline shows 'Assign Rep...' dropdown on unassigned leads
UI: My Team shows performance table with all columns (rank, name, leads, enrolled, conversion, commission, trend, actions)
UI: My Team shows View Leads and Reassign buttons
UI: Commissions shows 4 stat cards and status filters
UI: Reports shows 3 tabs (Lead Funnel, Enrollments, Commissions)
UI: Reports shows Recharts bar/line charts
UI: Dark sidebar bg-[#0F172A] with 'Manager Portal' title visible
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed React key warning in MyTeam component (moved key to React.Fragment wrapper)
Manager role check correctly implemented in CRMPortal.jsx - renders ManagerPortal instead of CRM rep view
Dark sidebar color bg-[#0F172A] correctly applied
All 5 manager pages implemented: Dashboard, Lead Pipeline (Kanban), My Team, Commissions, Reports
Reports use Recharts library for bar/line charts as specified
CSV export functionality available on all report tabs
seed_data_creation: Manager has 1 rep assigned (Sales Rep). System has 9 leads total.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manager Portal fully tested and working. All /api/manager/* endpoints return correct data scoped to manager's team. Frontend renders ManagerPortal for manager role with dark sidebar. React key warning fixed in MyTeam component. Recharts used for report visualizations.
